methodology.single_stat_line: all supported statistics generated inside the same simulation run
methodology.historical_sampling: bootstrap of verified player-game per-minute stat vectors
methodology.shared_uncertainty: same simulated minutes and game-level factor for every statistic
methodology.market_policy: sportsbook lines and prices never alter the basketball simulation
methodology.pair_policy: joint hit probability measured directly from unified simulations
